Subject:
// A/C SAIL / 75,000 MT (+)(-) 10% OO. PCI COAL IN BULK/ EX RUSSIA TO ECI //
DATE 02ND JAN 2026
REF :IBC/RT/005
HAVE FOLL TO FIX:
ACCT SAIL
CARGO AND QUANTITY:
75,000 MT (+)(-) 10% OO. PCI COAL IN BULK
LAYDAYS
: 21 FEB- 02 MARCH, 2026
LOADPORT:
1/2 SB 1 SP PORT OF VOSTOCHNY OR VANINO PORT, RUSSIA
LOADRATE:
20,000 MT PWWD SHINC.
DISCHARGEPORT:
1/ 2 SB / SA EACH 1/ 2 SP OUT OF VIZAG / GANGAVARAM / PARADIP / DHAMRA/GOPALPUR/ SANDHEADS OR SAGAR – HALDIA SYAMA PRASAD MOOKERJEE (SMP) /HALDIA SMP. SAGAR - HALDIA / HALDIA, IF USED, WILL ALWAYS BE 2ND DISCHARGE PORT.
DISCHARGE RATE:
VIZAG: 20,000 MT PWWD SASHEX UU
PARADIP: 10,000 MT PWWD SASHEX UU
GANGAVARAM (GPL): 40,000 MT SHINC
DHAMRA: 35000 MT SHINC
GOPALPUR : 15,000 MT, SHINC
SANDHEADS/SAGAR: 10000 MT SHINC
HALDIA: 12,000 MT PWWD SASHEX UU
(NOTE: UU/SHINC PROVISION TO BE APPLICABLE AFTER COMMENCEMENT OF LAYTIME).
DEMURRAGE/DESPATCH:
: THE CEILING DEMURRAGE RATE FOR THIS ENQUIRY SHALL BE USD 10500 PER DAY / HD BENDS. HOWEVER, BIDDERS CAN QUOTE BELOW THE CEILING RATE.
FREIGHT
: THE FREIGHT RATE TO BE QUOTED BASIS ONE LOAD PORT VOSTOCHNY, RUSSIA / ONE DISCHARGE PORT (VIZAG PORT) I.E. (1/1) BASIS WITH LOADRATE OF 20000 METRIC TONS/DISCHARGE RATE OF 20000 METRIC TONS.
REPLY BY 1200 HOURS IST WEDNESDAY I.E 07TH JAN 2026
+ + + +
